source.body_text_sample:
Skip to main content
 FR Login
Sponsor Now
Donate
Join the ERDO Team!

We need your gifts at ERDO!

Do you have a passion for Christian humanitarian ministry and want to be part of incredible life-transforming work?

ERDO (Emergency Relief and Development Overseas) is a registered Canadian charity that serves as the humanitarian agency of the Pentecostal Assemblies of Canada (PAOC). We work in over 30 countries worldwide providing child sponsorship, responding to crises and developing communities. We work with the world’s poorest people, regardless of religion, race, ethnicity or gender. Learn more about our mission, vision and values.  

There are no current job openings, but we invite you to watch this page and our LinkedIn account for upcoming opportunities.

Future Opportunities

If you would like to have your resume on file with us, please send it to HR@erdo.ca and indicate in the subject line of your message what type of position you are looking for.  These areas indicate the types of work we are involved in:

Accounting
Administration
Church Relations
Communications
Customer Care
Data Entry
Finance
Fundraising
Program Management
Public Engagement

Thank you for your interest in ERDO and working with our team.
